member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.Extensions.PrismExtensions
member.summary: Prism DI container extensions (requires Prism.Core package).

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Extensions.PrismExtensions.AddFoxMapKit(System.Object,System.Action{Fox.MapKit.MapKitOptions})
member.summary: Registers Fox.MapKit with Prism container (IContainerRegistry).
member.param: Optional configuration action for MapKit options.
member.remarks: Requires Prism.Core NuGet package and IContainerRegistry interface.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.Extensions.QueryableExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for IQueryable projection support (EF Core).

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Extensions.QueryableExtensions.ProjectTo``2(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0})
member.summary: Projects IQueryable<TSource> to IQueryable<TTarget> using registered projection expression.
member.returns: Projected queryable that can be composed with LINQ operators.
member.exception: Thrown when no projection is registered for TSource to TTarget.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: ASP.NET Core dependency injection extensions.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddFoxMapKit(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Fox.MapKit.MapKitOptions})
member.summary: Registers Fox.MapKit with dependency injection support.
member.param: Optional configuration action for MapKit options.
member.returns: The service collection for method chaining.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.IMapBuilder`2
member.summary: Fluent builder for configuring a specific mapping.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapBuilder`2.ExplicitOnly
member.summary: Disables all implicit mappings. Only explicitly configured properties will be mapped.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapBuilder`2.Ignore``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``0}})
member.summary: Ignores a specific target property.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapBuilder`2.IgnoreOnUpdate``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``0}})
member.summary: Ignores a specific target property only during MapToExisting (update operations). Property is still mapped during Map (create operations). Useful for audit fields like CreatedAt, CreatedBy that should be set once on creation.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapBuilder`2.Include``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``0}})
member.summary: Includes a specific property in explicit-only mode.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapBuilder`2.Map``2(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``1}},System.Action{`1,`0})
member.summary: Maps a source property to a target property.
member.param: Optional backward action for reverse mapping (types swapped: TTarget=src, TSource=dst)

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapBuilder`2.Map``2(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``1}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,``1}},System.Action{`1,`0})
member.summary: Maps a source property to a target property with transformation.
member.param: Optional backward action for reverse mapping (types swapped: TTarget=src, TSource=dst)

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapBuilder`2.MapIf``2(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``1}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Conditionally maps a property.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapBuilder`2.Default``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``0}},``0)
member.summary: Sets a default value for a target property.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapBuilder`2.Convert``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``0}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,Fox.MapKit.IMapContext,``0}},System.Action{`1,`0})
member.summary: Applies custom conversion logic for a property.
member.param: Optional backward action for reverse mapping (types swapped: TTarget=src, TSource=dst)

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapBuilder`2.ConstructWith(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,Fox.MapKit.IMapContext,`1}})
member.summary: Specifies custom constructor to use for target object creation. Useful for immutable types with constructor-based initialization.
member.param: Constructor expression that creates the target object
member.example: config.CreateMap<TaskEntity, TaskItem>() .ConstructWith((src, ctx) => new TaskItem(src.Id, src.Title, src.Description, ctx.Convert<DateTime?, Option<DateTime>>(src.DueDate)));

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapBuilder`2.BeforeMap(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Action{`0,`1}})
member.summary: Executes custom logic before mapping.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapBuilder`2.AfterMap(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Action{`0,`1}})
member.summary: Executes custom logic after mapping.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapBuilder`2.Flatten``2(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``1}})
member.summary: Maps a nested source property path to a flat target property (Flatten).

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapBuilder`2.Unflatten``2(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``1}})
member.summary: Maps a flat source property to a nested target property path (Unflatten).

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapBuilder`2.Reversible
member.summary: Enables automatic reverse mapping generation (TTarget -> TSource). Implicit mappings, nested objects, collections, and flatten operations are reversed automatically. Custom mappings (Map/Convert with expressions) require explicit backward parameter to be reversible.

list.item: Implicit property mappings (same name, compatible type)
Nested object mappings (if reverse mapper exists)
Collection mappings (if element reverse mapper exists)
Custom Map() with expressions or transforms
Custom mappings without backward parameter (FMK0014 error)

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.IMapConfig
member.summary: Configuration interface for defining mappings.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapConfig.CreateMap``2
member.summary: Creates a mapping between source and target types.
member.returns: Mapping builder for fluent configuration

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.IMapContext
member.summary: Context provided to mapping operations for custom logic and state.

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.IMapContext.Items
member.summary: Gets or sets custom state data.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapContext.TryResolve``1(System.String,``0@)
member.summary: Resolves a custom value for a specific property.
member.returns: True if value was resolved

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.IMapperRegistry
member.summary: Mapper registry interface for dependency injection support.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapperRegistry.GetMapper``2
member.summary: Gets mapper function for specified source and target types.
member.returns: Mapper function if registered, otherwise null.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapperRegistry.SetMapper``2(System.Func{``0,``1},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.ValueTuple{System.Type,System.Type}})
member.summary: Registers mapper function with optional nested dependencies.
member.param: Optional list of nested mapper dependencies.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapperRegistry.GetExistingMapper``2
member.summary: Gets existing mapper function that updates target in-place.
member.returns: Existing mapper function if registered, otherwise null.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapperRegistry.HasMapper``2
member.summary: Checks if mapper is registered for specified source and target types.
member.returns: True if mapper is registered, otherwise false.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.IMapperRegistry.Clear
member.summary: Clears all registered mappers (useful for testing).

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.Internal.DefaultMapContext
member.summary: Default implementation of IMapContext.

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.Internal.DefaultMapContext.Items
member.summary: Gets custom state data dictionary.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.DefaultMapContext.Convert``2(``0)
member.summary: Converts a value using registered type converter.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.DefaultMapContext.TryResolve``1(System.String,``0@)
member.summary: Resolves a custom value for a specific property.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.Internal.DefaultMapperRegistry
member.summary: Default thread-safe mapper registry implementation.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.DefaultMapperRegistry.GetMapper``2
member.summary: Gets mapper function for specified source and target types.
member.returns: Mapper function if registered, otherwise null.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.DefaultMapperRegistry.SetMapper``2(System.Func{``0,``1},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.ValueTuple{System.Type,System.Type}})
member.summary: Registers mapper function with optional nested dependencies.
member.param: Optional list of nested mapper dependencies.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.DefaultMapperRegistry.SetExistingMapper``2(System.Func{``0,``1,``1})
member.summary: Registers existing mapper function that updates target in-place.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.DefaultMapperRegistry.GetExistingMapper``2
member.summary: Gets existing mapper function for specified source and target types.
member.returns: Existing mapper function if registered, otherwise null.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.DefaultMapperRegistry.HasMapper``2
member.summary: Checks if mapper is registered for specified source and target types.
member.returns: True if mapper is registered, otherwise false.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.DefaultMapperRegistry.Clear
member.summary: Clears all registered mappers (useful for testing).

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapBuilder`2
member.summary: Internal implementation of IMapBuilder used only at compile-time by the source generator. This class is never instantiated at runtime.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapBuilder`2.ExplicitOnly
member.summary: Disables all implicit mappings. Only explicitly configured properties will be mapped.
member.returns: This builder instance for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapBuilder`2.Ignore``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``0}})
member.summary: Ignores a specific target property.
member.returns: This builder instance for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapBuilder`2.IgnoreOnUpdate``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``0}})
member.summary: Ignores a specific target property only during MapToExisting (update operations). Property is still mapped during Map (create operations). Useful for audit fields like CreatedAt, CreatedBy that should be set once on creation.
member.returns: This builder instance for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapBuilder`2.Include``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``0}})
member.summary: Includes a specific property in explicit-only mode.
member.returns: This builder instance for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapBuilder`2.Map``2(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``1}},System.Action{`1,`0})
member.summary: Maps a source property to a target property.
member.param: Optional backward action for reverse mapping.
member.returns: This builder instance for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapBuilder`2.Map``2(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``1}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,``1}},System.Action{`1,`0})
member.summary: Maps a source property to a target property with transformation.
member.param: Optional backward action for reverse mapping.
member.returns: This builder instance for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapBuilder`2.MapIf``2(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``1}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Conditionally maps a property.
member.returns: This builder instance for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapBuilder`2.Default``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``0}},``0)
member.summary: Sets a default value for a target property.
member.returns: This builder instance for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapBuilder`2.Convert``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``0}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,Fox.MapKit.IMapContext,``0}},System.Action{`1,`0})
member.summary: Applies custom conversion logic for a property.
member.param: Optional backward action for reverse mapping.
member.returns: This builder instance for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapBuilder`2.ConstructWith(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,Fox.MapKit.IMapContext,`1}})
member.summary: Specifies custom constructor to use for target object creation.
member.param: Constructor expression that creates the target object.
member.returns: This builder instance for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapBuilder`2.BeforeMap(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Action{`0,`1}})
member.summary: Executes custom logic before mapping.
member.returns: This builder instance for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapBuilder`2.AfterMap(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Action{`0,`1}})
member.summary: Executes custom logic after mapping.
member.returns: This builder instance for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapBuilder`2.Flatten``2(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``1}})
member.summary: Maps a nested source property path to a flat target property.
member.returns: This builder instance for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapBuilder`2.Unflatten``2(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``1}})
member.summary: Maps a flat source property to a nested target property path.
member.returns: This builder instance for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapBuilder`2.Reversible
member.summary: Enables automatic reverse mapping generation.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapConfig
member.summary: Internal implementation of IMapConfig used only at compile-time by the source generator. This class is never instantiated at runtime.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapConfig.CreateMap``2
member.summary: Creates a mapping between source and target types.
member.returns: Mapping builder for fluent configuration.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapperRegistry
member.summary: Global registry of all registered mappings for validation purposes.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapperRegistry.MappingEntry
member.summary: Internal record representing a registered mapping entry with validation callback and nested dependencies.
member.param: Function to check if mapper is available at runtime.
Collection of nested mapper dependencies (source and target types).

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapperRegistry.MappingEntry.#ctor(System.Type,System.Type,System.Func{System.Boolean},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.ValueTuple{System.Type,System.Type}})
member.summary: Internal record representing a registered mapping entry with validation callback and nested dependencies.
member.param: Function to check if mapper is available at runtime.
Collection of nested mapper dependencies (source and target types).

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapperRegistry.MappingEntry.Source
member.summary: Source type of the mapping.

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapperRegistry.MappingEntry.Target
member.summary: Target type of the mapping.

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapperRegistry.MappingEntry.IsMapperAvailable
member.summary: Function to check if mapper is available at runtime.

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapperRegistry.MappingEntry.NestedDependencies
member.summary: Collection of nested mapper dependencies (source and target types).

member.name: F:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapperRegistry.registeredMappings
member.summary: Thread-safe dictionary of registered mappings keyed by (source type, target type) tuple. Used for O(1) lookup performance during validation.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapperRegistry.RegisterMapping(System.Type,System.Type,System.Func{System.Boolean},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.ValueTuple{System.Type,System.Type}})
member.summary: Registers a mapping between source and target types with validation callback.
member.param: Function to check if mapper is available at runtime.
Optional collection of nested mapper dependencies.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapperRegistry.GetAllRegisteredMappings
member.summary: Gets all registered mappings for validation.
member.returns: Collection of tuples containing source type, target type, availability status, and nested dependencies for each registered mapping.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapperRegistry.IsRegistered(System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Checks if a mapping is registered.
member.returns: True if the mapping is registered; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Internal.MapperRegistry.Clear
member.summary: Clears all registered mappings (useful for testing).

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.ITypeConverter`2
member.summary: Defines a custom type converter for mapping between incompatible property types.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.ITypeConverter`2.Convert(`0,Fox.MapKit.IMapContext)
member.summary: Converts a source value to the target type.
member.param: Mapping context for accessing custom state.
member.returns: Converted target value.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.MapContext
member.summary: Default implementation of IMapContext.

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.MapContext.Items
member.summary: Gets or sets custom state data.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.MapContext.TryResolve``1(System.String,``0@)
member.summary: Resolves a custom value for a specific property.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.MapContextExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for IMapContext.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.MapContextExtensions.Convert``2(Fox.MapKit.IMapContext,``0)
member.summary: Converts a value using registered type converter.
member.returns: Converted value
member.exception: Thrown when no converter is registered for the type pair

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.MapKitGlobalRegistry
member.summary: Helper for setting global mapper registry across all MapperCache instances.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.MapKitGlobalRegistry.SetGlobalRegistry(Fox.MapKit.IMapperRegistry)
member.summary: Sets global registry provider for all existing and future MapperCache instances.

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.MapKitGlobalRegistry.GlobalRegistryProvider
member.summary: Gets the current global registry provider.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.MapKitOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for Fox.MapKit.

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.MapKitOptions.EnableValidation
member.summary: Enables mapper validation at startup (checks for missing nested mappers).

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.MapKitOptions.EnableProjections
member.summary: Enables IQueryable projection support.

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.MapKitOptions.CustomRegistry
member.summary: Custom mapper registry implementation (defaults to DefaultMapperRegistry).

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.Mapper
member.summary: Main entry point for compile-time mapping operations.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Mapper.Map``2(``0)
member.summary: Maps a source object to a target type using compile-time generated mapper.
member.returns: Mapped target object

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Mapper.Map``2(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Maps a collection of source objects to a list of target objects.
member.returns: List of mapped target objects

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Mapper.MapToExisting``2(``0,``1)
member.summary: Maps properties from source to existing target instance. Updates target object in-place instead of creating new instance.
member.typeparam: Target type to map to (must be reference type).
member.returns: Updated target object (same reference).
member.exception: Thrown when source or target is null.
Thrown when no mapping is defined for the type pair.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Mapper.ValidateAllMappings
member.summary: Validates all registered mappings at runtime.
member.returns: Validation result containing any errors found

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Mapper.CreateNoMappingException``2
member.summary: Creates exception for when no mapping is defined.
member.returns: InvalidOperationException with detailed error message.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.MapperCache`2
member.summary: Internal cache for mapper functions with dependency injection support.

member.name: F:Fox.MapKit.MapperCache`2.staticMapper
member.summary: Internal storage for the static mapper function delegate. Null if no mapper has been registered for this source/target pair.

member.name: F:Fox.MapKit.MapperCache`2.staticContextMapper
member.summary: Internal storage for the static context-aware mapper function delegate. Used when mapping requires IMapContext (type converters, custom constructors).

member.name: F:Fox.MapKit.MapperCache`2.staticExistingMapper
member.summary: Internal storage for the static existing mapper function delegate. Updates existing target instance instead of creating new instance.

member.name: F:Fox.MapKit.MapperCache`2.staticContextExistingMapper
member.summary: Internal storage for the static context-aware existing mapper function delegate. Updates existing target instance with IMapContext support.

member.name: F:Fox.MapKit.MapperCache`2.registryProvider
member.summary: Optional DI registry provider for dependency injection scenarios. When set, GetMapper() prioritizes this registry over static cache.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.MapperCache`2.SetRegistryProvider(Fox.MapKit.IMapperRegistry)
member.summary: Sets global DI registry provider for this source/target pair.
member.param: Mapper registry provider to use, or null for static cache.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.MapperCache`2.SetMapper(System.Func{`0,`1},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.ValueTuple{System.Type,System.Type}})
member.summary: Sets the mapper function for this source/target pair. Routes to DI registry if available; otherwise uses static cache.
member.param: Optional list of nested mapper dependencies.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.MapperCache`2.SetMapper(System.Func{`0,Fox.MapKit.IMapContext,`1},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.ValueTuple{System.Type,System.Type}})
member.summary: Sets the context-aware mapper function for this source/target pair. Used when mapping requires IMapContext (type converters, custom constructors).
member.param: Optional list of nested mapper dependencies.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.MapperCache`2.SetExistingMapper(System.Func{`0,`1,`1})
member.summary: Sets the existing mapper function for this source/target pair. Updates existing target instance instead of creating new instance.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.MapperCache`2.SetExistingMapper(System.Func{`0,`1,Fox.MapKit.IMapContext,`1})
member.summary: Sets the context-aware existing mapper function for this source/target pair. Updates existing target instance with IMapContext support.
member.param: Context-aware existing mapper function to register.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.MapperCache`2.GetMapper
member.summary: Gets the mapper function from DI registry or static cache.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.MapperCache`2.GetExistingMapper
member.summary: Gets the existing mapper function from static cache. Returns function that updates existing target instance instead of creating new one.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.MapperExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for fluent mapping API.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.MapperExtensions.MapFrom``2(``1,``0)
member.summary: Maps properties from source to this target instance (fluent API). Updates target object in-place instead of creating new instance.
member.typeparam: Target type to map to (must be reference type).
member.returns: Updated target object (same reference) for method chaining.
member.exception: Thrown when source or target is null.
Thrown when no mapping is defined for the type pair.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.MapProfile
member.summary: Base class for mapping profiles. Inherit from this to define compile-time mappings. This class exists only at compile-time and is processed by the source generator.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.MapProfile.Configure(Fox.MapKit.IMapConfig)
member.summary: Override this method to configure mappings.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.MapProfileAttribute
member.summary: Marks a MapProfile class for source generator discovery. Apply this attribute to classes inheriting from MapProfile.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.ProjectionCache`2
member.summary: Cache for projection expressions used by IQueryable projection (EF Core support).

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.ProjectionCache`2.SetProjection(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,`1}})
member.summary: Sets the projection expression for TSource to TTarget mapping. Called by generated code (ModuleInitializer) to register projection.
member.param: Expression tree for mapping TSource to TTarget.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.ProjectionCache`2.GetProjection
member.summary: Gets the registered projection expression for TSource to TTarget mapping. Returns null if no projection is registered.
member.returns: Projection expression or null if not registered.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.TypeConverterRegistry
member.summary: Registry for custom type converters used in mappings.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.TypeConverterRegistry.RegisterGlobalConverter``2(System.Func{``0,Fox.MapKit.IMapContext,``1})
member.summary: Registers a global type converter available to all mappings.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.TypeConverterRegistry.RegisterProfileConverter``2(System.String,System.Func{``0,Fox.MapKit.IMapContext,``1})
member.summary: Registers a profile-specific type converter.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.TypeConverterRegistry.GetConverter``2(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a converter for the specified type pair (checks profile-specific first, then global).
member.returns: Converter function if found, null otherwise.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.TypeConverterRegistry.HasConverter(System.Type,System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a converter exists for the specified type pair.
member.returns: True if converter exists, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.TypeConverterRegistry.Clear
member.summary: Clears all registered converters (useful for testing).

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationError
member.summary: Represents a validation error discovered during runtime mapping validation.

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationError.Message
member.summary: Gets the error message.

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationError.ErrorType
member.summary: Gets the type of validation error.

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationError.SourceType
member.summary: Gets the source type name.

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationError.TargetType
member.summary: Gets the target type name.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationError.#ctor(System.String,Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationErrorType,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ValidationError class.
member.param: Error message describing the validation failure.
Optional source type name involved in the error.
Optional target type name involved in the error.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationError.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the validation error.
member.returns: Formatted error message including error type and source/target types if available.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationErrorType
member.summary: Type of validation error.

member.name: F:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationErrorType.MissingMapper
member.summary: No mapper registered for the specified source and target types.

member.name: F:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationErrorType.MissingNestedMapper
member.summary: Nested mapping requires a mapper that is not registered.

member.name: F:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationErrorType.MissingCollectionElementMapper
member.summary: Collection element mapper is not registered.

member.name: T:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationResult
member.summary: Result of runtime mapping validation.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the ValidationResult class.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationResult.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationError})
member.summary: Result of runtime mapping validation.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the ValidationResult class.

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationResult.Errors
member.summary: Gets the list of validation errors.

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationResult.IsValid
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the validation was successful (no errors).

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationResult.HasCriticalErrors
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether there are critical errors (missing mappers).

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationResult.MissingMapperCount
member.summary: Gets the count of missing mapper errors.

member.name: P:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationResult.MissingNestedMapperCount
member.summary: Gets the count of missing nested mapper errors.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationResult.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the validation result.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationResult.Success
member.summary: Creates a successful validation result.
member.returns: Validation result with no errors.

member.name: M:Fox.MapKit.Validation.ValidationResult.ThrowIfInvalid
member.summary: Throws an exception if validation failed.
